title: 介绍活动定义 / Introducing activity (FAA-N02)
point: 介绍活动 = 将客户介绍给被介绍人以提供财务顾问服务，可附带经同意转交客户资料及提供产品事实信息。 / Introducing = introducing a client to an introducee for FA service, optionally forwarding client particulars with consent and giving factual product information.
keyfacts: 依 FAA 第 58 条发出 / Issued under section 58 FAA
适用持牌及 23(1)(a)–(e) 豁免人 / Applies to licensed FAs and 23(1)(a)–(e) exempt persons

title: 介绍人五项要求 / Five introducer requirements (FAA-N02)
point: 书面协议、依 FAR Reg 31 披露、提供脚本、禁止收受客户金钱/财产、维持介绍人登记册。 / Written agreement, FAR Reg 31 disclosure, provision of script, prohibition on handling client money/property, maintenance of register.
keyfacts: 介绍人不得建议/推荐、推销 CIS 或安排人寿保单 / No advice, no marketing CIS, no arranging life policies
登记册含姓名、营业地点、电话、登记号/IC、委任与终止日期 / Register: name, place, phone, reg/IC no., dates

title: 豁免人禁止陈述 / Prohibited representations (FAA-N10)
point: 依 Reg 27(1)(d) 豁免人及其代表不得表示自己受 MAS 发牌、规管、监督或注册（口头或书面）。 / Exempt persons under Reg 27(1)(d) and their reps must not represent they are licensed, regulated, supervised or registered by MAS.
keyfacts: 豁免人 = 23(1)(f) 条 + FAR Reg 27(1)(d) / Exempt person = s23(1)(f) + FAR Reg 27(1)(d)
每场合 ≤30 名认可投资者（人寿保单除外）/ ≤30 accredited investors per occasion (excl. life policies)

title: 临时代表入职要求 / Provisional rep entry (FAA-N12)
point: 至少 21 岁、正/已迁居新加坡、至少 3 年相关经验、至少学士学位或专业资格。 / At least 21, relocating/relocated to Singapore, ≥3 years relevant experience, ≥Bachelor's degree or professional qualification.
keyfacts: 依 FAA 第 23D 及 58 条发出 / Issued under sections 23D and 58 FAA
3 个月宽限期通过 FAA-N13 考试 / 3-month grace period to pass FAA-N13 exams

title: 临时代表有效期 / Provisional rep validity (FAA-N12)
point: 委任自其名列入公开代表登记册起最长三个月有效。 / Appointment is valid for up to three months from entry into the public register of representatives.
keyfacts: 公开代表登记册起算 / Counted from public register entry

title: 不当行为报告时限 / Misconduct report deadline (FAA-N14)
point: 发现后不迟于 14 天经 MASNET 提交不当行为报告。 / Lodge the Misconduct Report via MASNET not later than 14 days after discovery.
keyfacts: 自 2011 年 1 月 1 日生效 / Effective 1 January 2011
重大进展提交更新报告 / Update Report on significant developments

title: 可报告不当行为四类 / Four misconduct types (FAA-N14)
point: (a) 欺诈/不诚实；(b) 不当建议、失实陈述或披露不足；(c) 不符 FSG-G01 适当人选；(d) 其他违规。 / (a) fraud/dishonesty; (b) inappropriate advice, misrepresentation or inadequate disclosure; (c) failure to satisfy FSG-G01; (d) other misconduct.
keyfacts: 欺诈类应报警并提交报案副本 / Fraud cases: lodge police report and submit copy

title: 违规罚则 / Penalty for contravention (FAA-N14)
point: 依第 58(5) 条违反 Notice 罚款最高 $25,000，持续违例每日另加最高 $2,500。 / Under section 58(5), contravention is a fine up to $25,000, and a further $2,500 per day for a continuing offence.
keyfacts: 无可报告事项须 12 月 31 日后 14 天内提交年度声明 / Annual declaration within 14 days after 31 Dec if no reportable misconduct

title: ISA Unit 独立性 / ISA Unit independence (FAA-N20)
point: ISA 单元须独立于财务顾问服务单元、不监督相关代表、且有能力评估服务质量并判定违规。 / The ISA Unit must be independent of the FA services unit, not supervise the relevant representatives, and be competent to assess service quality and determine infractions.
keyfacts: 可由合规/风险职能或外包第三方担任（须满足独立性）/ May use compliance/risk function or outsource if independence met

title: 60% 浮动收入测量 / 60% variable income rule (FAA-N20)
point: 仅有浮动收入者测量浮动收入的 60% 对照非销售 KPI；有固定薪+浮动者测量全部浮动收入。 / Variable-income-only: measure 60% of variable income against non-sales KPIs; fixed salary + variable: measure all variable income.
keyfacts: 非销售 KPI 不得用其他 KPI 测量特定浮动收入 / Specified variable income not measured against other KPIs

title: 第一轮抽样比例 / First-round sampling (FAA-N20)
point: 第一轮交易后检查最低抽样：被选代表 10%、仅做 DCI/结构票据滚动者 2%、其他代表 5%。 / First-round minimum sampling: selected representative 10%, DCI/structured-note rollover-only 2%, any other representative 5%.
keyfacts: 被选代表 = 连续两季 B 级或更差 / Selected rep = grade B or worse for two consecutive quarters

title: 违规分类 / Infraction categories (FAA-N20)
point: Category 1 = 对客户利益有重大影响或影响代表适当性；Category 2 = 非 Category 1 的所有违规。一件 Category 1 即落 E 级。 / Category 1 = material impact on client interests or impinging on fitness/propriety; Category 2 = all others. One Category 1 → Grade E.
keyfacts: 明显不适合的推荐、不必要的转换为 Category 1 例子 / Clearly unsuitable recommendation, unnecessary switching are Cat-1 examples

title: FAA-N26 生效与 CPD 时数 / Effective date & CPD hours (FAA-N26)
point: 自 2024 年 4 月 1 日生效（取代 FAA-N13）。每历年 CPD：核心 6 小时 + 补充 10 或 24 小时（取最高）。 / Effective 1 April 2024 (replaces FAA-N13). Yearly CPD: 6 Core hours + 10 or 24 Supplementary hours (take highest).
keyfacts: 核心课程须经 IBF 或 SCI 认可 / Core course accredited by IBF or SCI
首次受任当年免 CPD / First year of appointment exempt from CPD

title: RES5 合格有效期 / Validity of RES5 pass (FAA-N26)
point: RES5 合格如三年内未以委任代表展业，或停业满三年未重启，即失效，须重考。 / A RES5 pass ceases to be valid if not used as an appointed rep within 3 years, or after 3 years of cessation — must re-take.
keyfacts: 入职最低学历 GCE 'A' Level / IB / 理工文凭或同等 / Min academic: GCE 'A' Level / IB / poly diploma or equivalent
